name: The Lottery Corporation Limited
analysis: TLC has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.4614. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$5.4614, stop A$5.0837, target A$5.5000. Risk/reward is 0.10:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
